title: Senior Financial Analyst - Star Health Insurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Star Health Insurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Star Health Insurance in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Star Health Insurance:
Star Health Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
